title: Find My Device - User location on the map
scenario: User location on the map should display correctly on both Android and iOS when using Find My Device with headset connected or disconnected
steps: Open Find My Device with the headset connected.
Observe the user's location on the map.
Zoom out on the map and note the location indicator appearance.
Zoom in on the map and note the location indicator appearance.
Repeat steps 1-4 with the headset disconnected.
Repeat steps 1-5 on both Android and iOS devices.
expected: On Android: A full blue dot is shown when zoomed out, and a blue circle with a full blue dot in the middle when zoomed in. On iOS: A full blue dot is shown when zoomed out, and a white circle when zoomed in. This behavior should be consistent whether the headset is connected or disconnected.
